tasks.description: Create /user/[id] route page with user data fetching
tasks.acceptance: Page displays username and join date, returns notFound() for invalid/missing user IDs

tasks.description: Add user reviews query and display using ReviewCard component
tasks.acceptance: Reviews list shows rating stars, title, body, date with links to item pages

tasks.description: Add user created items query and display list
tasks.acceptance: Items list shows name, category, date with links to item pages

tasks.description: Add profile link to Navbar for logged-in users
tasks.acceptance: Navbar shows 'Profile' link that navigates to /user/[userId]
